name: raak
description: Issue tracker for teams that work on multiple projects. High density. Fast. Fun.
author: CellaJS <info@cellajs.com>

scripts.docker:test: docker compose -f backend/compose.yaml --profile test up -d --wait db_test
scripts.sdk: pnpm --filter backend generate:openapi && pnpm --filter sdk generate:sdk
scripts.dev:proxy: pnpm clean && cross-env pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter backend --filter cdc --filter frontend --filter proxy dev
scripts.check: pnpm sdk && pnpm -r --filter '!raak' ts && pnpm lint:fix
scripts.tsperf: pnpm --filter backend tsperf && pnpm --filter frontend tsperf && pnpm --filter cdc tsperf && pnpm --filter yjs tsperf
scripts.test:core: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=core vitest run
scripts.test:full: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=full vitest run
scripts.test:update: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=core vitest run -u
scripts.coverage: pnpm docker:test && cross-env TEST_MODE=core vitest run --coverage
scripts.offline: cross-env pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter backend --filter cdc dev & pnpm --filter frontend offline
